T4127-JAN Payroll Deductions Formulas – 122nd Edition

The 122nd edition of Payroll Deductions Formulas is effective January 1, 2026.

See also: Payroll Deductions Formulas for Computer Programs

Federal income tax rates and income thresholds

Use the following rates to calculate federal income tax.

Annual taxable income ($) Tax rate (%)
$0 to $57,375 15%
$57,376 to $114,750 20.5%
$114,751 to $158,519 26%
$158,520 to $220,000 29%
Over $220,000 33%

Basic personal amount (BPA)

The maximum basic personal amount is $16,129.00 for employees whose net income is $173,205 or less.

The minimum basic personal amount is $14,538.00 for employees whose net income is $246,752 or more.
